nodes.name: torque_adjustment
nodes.conceptual_summary: Effort-over-gain joint deflection correction with bounded magnitude.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: The source class exposes processSample as the observable public behavior; magnitudeLimit is an internal helper.

nodes.name: apply_torque_adjustment
nodes.description: Subtract a bounded effort-over-gain correction from configured joint positions.

inputs.name: names
inputs.constraints: joint names aligned with positions and efforts

inputs.name: positions
inputs.constraints: finite joint positions aligned with names

inputs.name: efforts
inputs.constraints: finite joint efforts aligned with names

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: finite adjusted joint positions preserving input order

nodes.type_signature: (names: Sequence[str], positions: Sequence[float], efforts: Sequence[float], joints_to_filter: Sequence[str], filter_gains: Sequence[float], max_adjustment: float = 0.1) -> list[float]
nodes.conceptual_summary: Pronto TorqueAdjustment::processSample semantics without mutating the caller's position vector.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: One atom captures the source-backed public transform while inlining the private clamp helper.
